name: High Fidelity
description:
High Fidelity — DVD, John Cusack, Special Edition. Japanese release (Touchstone / Buena Vista), Region 2 NTSC, 114 minutes.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- A beloved music-nerd film — about a record-shop owner who organizes his life through Top 5 lists.
- Region 2 NTSC — plays fine on Japanese players.

**Condition:** disc only, in a binder sleeve — no original case or cover art.
